screener_meta.stage2_avg_vol_basis: 20-day average daily volume from daily get_equity_historicals (threshold >5,000,000 shares). NOTE: prior runs used a 30-day ADV basis; today used 20-day. Both defensible vs prompt's unspecified 'Average Daily Volume'. Operator may wish to pin one basis.
screener_meta.atr_basis: 14-day ATR = simple average of True Range over last 14 daily bars, as % of last close.

alerts.detail: RECURRING infra issue (every run). Container started on an ORPHAN local 'master' (no commits, empty tree); authoritative state is origin/main. This run again nearly mis-initialized a FALSE 'first run' before fetching origin/main; recovered via 'git checkout -B main origin/main' before persisting. PUSH: a github.com->local proxy insteadOf rewrite causes 403 on git-receive-pack; push DIRECT bypassing the rewrite. Operator should fix provisioning to clone current origin/main.

CMCSA Momentum Breakout fired strongly (px 24.685 > 06-26 high 23.225; time-of-day RVOL 10.55x) and was the ONLY breakout signal that sizes to >=2 whole shares (2 sh @ ~24.69 = $49.38 within the 10% budget $60.96). SKIPPED because CMCSA is ALREADY a tracked position ($49.37); a 2nd tranche would raise combined CMCSA to ~$98.75 = 16.2% of equity, exceeding the 15% single-position cap under the per-position (concentration) interpretation. Prompt text frames the cap as 'purchasing the minimum 2 shares exceeds 15%' (per-purchase), which would PASS ($49.38<$91.44). Per the Ground Rule 'never exceed exposure caps under any condition' and the 'do not guess on ambiguity' rule, chose the cap-respecting reading and did NOT add. OPERATOR: clarify whether the 15% single-position cap is per-purchase or per-name-total, and whether same-name pyramiding is permitted.

Three other momentum-breakout signals fired but skipped on the 2-share minimum / 15% cap given the small account ($609.61): RKLB (px 91.90>86.28, RVOL 1.64; affordable whole sh=0), RBLX (px 54.045>47.69, RVOL 2.98; affordable=1 and 2sh $108.16>15% cap $91.44), MSTR (px 89.00>87.67, RVOL 1.99; affordable=0). Per sizing rules: skipped + alerted.

Ongoing: current prompt sizing = 10% of total equity for max whole shares, 15% single-position cap, 2-share floor, whole-shares-only. The 06-26 IBRX entry used a then-current 6% basis. Operator should confirm 10% is the pinned basis.
